//: Lighthouse CI config for the consumer Learning Player. Runs against the prod preview built by `npm run build`; PWA + Performance categories are the gates. See .github/workflows/python-app.yml :: app-lighthouse.

collect.//: Serve dist/ statically on :4174 (matches vite preview default); LHCI boots this itself.

settings.//: PWA install prompt requires interaction — the audit runs in a headless simulator so the install-prompt check is best-effort. We still enforce icon/manifest/SW discovery.

assertions.//_pwa_gate: Individual PWA audits — precise enough to fail on the specific traps the shipping guide calls out. `categories:pwa` is deprecated in modern Lighthouse in favor of these audits.
assertions.//_perf_gate: Performance is a warn-only floor — we care about not regressing catastrophically, not chasing 100.
